dsl_rule.translation_notes: Partial decline detected via declining volume (buying enthusiasm dries up) and lower close. Entry triggered when price consolidates with partial decline within formation. Exit on upward breakout above moving average (impending upward breakout). Pattern detection (consolidation vs reversal identification) cannot be quantified with allowed indicators, but volume and price action capture the partial decline mechanics described.

backtest_rule.reason: Partial decline detected via declining volume (buying enthusiasm dries up) and lower close. Entry triggered when price consolidates with partial decline within formation. Exit on upward breakout above moving average (impending upward breakout). Pattern detection (consolidation vs reversal identification) cannot be quantified with allowed indicators, but volume and price action capture the partial decline mechanics described.

source_rule_text: Consolidation or Reversal Pattern: Partial decline often indicates an impending upward breakout, particularly effective for consolidations or reversals
